untranslatable_reason: The signal requires detection of three specific candlestick/chart patterns (Descending Triangle, Big W pattern, and Morning Doji Star) which are not available as discrete indicators in the allowed set. These patterns require multi-bar structural analysis beyond single-bar properties and moving average comparisons. The source text provides no quantitative parameters for these patterns. A complete translation would require pattern-recognition indicators not in the allowed list.
translation_notes: Attempted partial translation using proxies: body_pct < 0.1 approximates a doji candlestick; open > prev_close approximates gap-up confirmation; close > sma_20 represents uptrend alignment. However, this is insufficient without proper pattern detection indicators. Parameters marked AUTHOR_SILENT were excluded per rule 8 (used reversal exit instead). Exit uses sma_20 crossover as trend-following reversal signal.
